The Brief

A studio that needed
to shine online.

Smilesthetics by Dio is a premium teeth whitening studio in Graz, Austria. They needed a website that matched the sophistication of their service — elegant, trustworthy, and conversion-focused.

We built a fully custom multi-page website featuring bilingual support (DE/EN), before/after galleries, online booking integration, and a complete pricing system — all delivered within 48 hours.
